# JobTally

> JobTally is a job-costing and crew-management app for small contractors running a 2–10 man crew. It tracks crew hours with one-tap GPS clock-in, scans receipts (auto-reading the store and total), and shows live per-job profit — from the phone already in the owner's pocket. It also handles estimates, invoices, mileage, job photos, and tax exports.

## Key facts
- Category: job costing / field-service software for contractors
- Best for: small contractors and remodelers with a 2–10 person crew
- Pricing: $150/month, or $1,200/year (4 months free). Every feature included, unlimited crew, no per-seat charges.
- Free trial: 30 days, no credit card required
- Platform: web app, works on any phone (iOS/Android), no install
- Origin: built for a contractor in Troy, NY who couldn't see whether his jobs made money
- Website: https://www.getjobtally.com

## What makes it different
- Live per-job profit while the job is still running — not months later at tax time
- Flat price with unlimited users — job costing is not gated behind a higher tier or per-user fees
- Receipt scanning that auto-books expenses to the right job
- Setup in about 5 minutes with a guided checklist

## Pages
- [Homepage](https://www.getjobtally.com/): overview, features, pricing, FAQ
- [Features](https://www.getjobtally.com/features/): full feature list
- [Pricing](https://www.getjobtally.com/pricing/): $150/mo or $1,200/yr, 30-day free trial
- [Job costing app for contractors](https://www.getjobtally.com/job-costing-app-for-contractors/): the core use case
- [Contractor profit tracking](https://www.getjobtally.com/contractor-profit-tracking/): tracking profit per job
- [Crew time tracking](https://www.getjobtally.com/crew-time-tracking-app/): GPS clock-in for crews
- [Best job costing apps for small contractors (2026)](https://www.getjobtally.com/best-job-costing-app-for-small-contractors/): comparison hub
- [JobTally vs Jobber](https://www.getjobtally.com/compare/jobber/): comparison
- [How job costing works](https://www.getjobtally.com/guides/job-costing/): guide for contractors
- [For remodelers](https://www.getjobtally.com/remodelers): remodeler-specific page with a free profit calculator
